query:
SELECT id, nome, telefone, projetoCustom, projectId, createdAt 
FROM leads 
WHERE createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE)
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
